productionReadyReason: Prototype production review criteria passed: architecture, inventory, sitemap, flow, navigation, CTA, runtime, assets, interaction, responsive, E2E, visual QA, accessibility, child safety, and warning checks are all PASS.
taskCompleteReason: HTML prototype task complete within scoped prototype review: all gates passed and no failures or warnings remain.

productionReviewCriteria.name: Page Inventory
productionReviewCriteria.detail: Required page fields, banned terms, and generic content checks passed

productionReviewCriteria.name: Sitemap
productionReviewCriteria.detail: Sitemap groups and navigation matrix cover every page

productionReviewCriteria.name: Flow
productionReviewCriteria.detail: 5 user flows validated through route render and state controls

productionReviewCriteria.name: Navigation
productionReviewCriteria.detail: 35 navigation rows include back, next, CTA, and recovery

productionReviewCriteria.name: CTA
productionReviewCriteria.detail: Primary and secondary CTA defined for every page

productionReviewCriteria.name: Prototype Runtime
productionReviewCriteria.detail: All viewport runtime passes have zero console errors

productionReviewCriteria.name: Prototype Assets
productionReviewCriteria.detail: Runtime asset scan found zero broken assets or 404 responses

productionReviewCriteria.name: Interaction
productionReviewCriteria.detail: Visible controls and CTA coverage validated on every page

productionReviewCriteria.name: E2E
productionReviewCriteria.detail: Routes, controls, API contracts, and recovery coverage passed

productionReviewCriteria.name: Accessibility
productionReviewCriteria.detail: Accessibility rules and state controls passed gate checks

productionReviewCriteria.name: Child Safety
productionReviewCriteria.detail: No banned adult, violent, gambling, or horror terms detected

evidence.detail: Parent UI uses 16px minimum body text; child-facing labels pair short text with large visual cues.
8px grid with 24px screen gutters and 48px minimum touch rows.
Warm paper base, green trust actions, blue learning surfaces, amber progress, low-stimulus night mode.
Icons are symbolic support only; primary meaning remains in text or illustrated controls.
Short purposeful transitions under 260ms; bedtime mode removes bounce and loops.
All interactive controls are at least 44px high; primary child controls are at least 64px.
all 35 pages have unique renderer functions
175 screenshots generated for 35 pages and 5 review states
